message:
Fix UPDATE trigger column extraction, track version coalescing in ARC cache, and correct 64KB page checksum offset

- Fix UPDATE trigger event column extraction to use flat_map for
  ColumnList assignment targets, emitting all columns instead of only
  the first, ensuring trigger WHERE clauses correctly match multi-column
  UPDATE statements
- Increment version_coalesce_count when superseded versions are evicted
  from T1/T2 in the ARC cache, making the coalescing metric accurate
  for monitoring cache turnover patterns
- Fix integrity_check_level1_page cell content offset calculation for
  64KB pages where the first page has a 100-byte header: use page.len()
  instead of hardcoded 65536 so page 1 (which is 65436 bytes after
  header stripping) computes the correct content area boundary
- Update beads issue tracker status (bd-19u.4 moved to in_progress)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:

 {"id":"bd-19u.1","title":"Structured tracing with franken_trace spans","description":"Structured tracing integration: franken_trace spans for all major operations (parse, plan, execute, storage). TraceId/DecisionId from franken_kernel. Span hierarchy: statement > plan > execution > storage. OpenTelemetry export. Tracing: meta-span 'trace_export' with fields spans_exported, export_latency_us. Log level: configurable per-subsystem. Metric: fsqlite_trace_spans_total counter, fsqlite_trace_export_errors_total counter.","acceptance_criteria":"1. All major operations emit tracing spans. 2. Span hierarchy: statement > plan > exec > storage. 3. OpenTelemetry export functional. 4. TraceId from franken_kernel propagated.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:03:34.206301679Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-13T19:12:16.167756473Z","closed_at":"2026-02-13T19:12:16.143778514Z","close_reason":"Completed structured tracing spans/metrics/export instrumentation and PRAGMA surfaces","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["frankensqlite","impl","observability"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-19u.1","depends_on_id":"bd-19u","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:23:01Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":2964,"issue_id":"bd-19u.1","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Implemented structured tracing integration across parse/plan/statement/execution/storage lanes. Changes: (1) new trace metrics API in fsqlite-observability: fsqlite_trace_spans_total, fsqlite_trace_export_errors_total, trace/decision id allocators, trace_export meta-span emitter; (2) connection pipeline instrumentation in fsqlite-core: parse spans in prepare/query/execute paths, statement span with trace_id+decision_id, plan spans around compile_expression_select + compile_table_select/insert/update/delete, execution spans around table execution/VDBE execution, storage spans in MvccPageIo read/write, and trace_export accounting with export_latency_us; (3) subsystem-targeted spans for per-subsystem level control via tracing filters: fsqlite.parse, fsqlite.plan, fsqlite.statement, fsqlite.execution, fsqlite.storage, fsqlite.trace_export; (4) PRAGMA surfaces added: trace_stats + trace_reset; (5) tests added for observability counters and trace pragma exposure/reset. Validation: cargo +nightly test -p fsqlite-observability (28 passed), cargo +nightly test -p fsqlite-core (972 passed), cargo +nightly check -p fsqlite-core --all-targets (pass), rustfmt --check on touched files (pass). Note: cargo +nightly clippy -p fsqlite-core --all-targets -- -D warnings currently fails in unrelated pre-existing repair_engine lints at crates/fsqlite-core/src/repair_engine.rs:333 and :612.","created_at":"2026-02-13T19:12:16Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-19u.2","title":"Evidence ledger for SSI commit/abort decisions","description":"Evidence ledger for SSI decisions: Record every commit/abort decision with full evidence (read-set, write-set, conflict graph, decision reason). Follows franken_evidence schema. Queryable evidence store. Galaxy-brain transparency: Level 0 (commit/abort indicator), Level 1 (conflict explanation), Level 2 (full antidependency graph). Tracing: span 'evidence_record' with fields decision_id, outcome, evidence_size_bytes. Log level: INFO all decisions, DEBUG evidence details. Metric: fsqlite_evidence_records_total counter by outcome.","acceptance_criteria":"1. Every SSI abort has evidence record. 2. Galaxy-brain transparency: 3 disclosure levels. 3. Evidence queryable by txn_id/time range. 4. Follows franken_evidence schema.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:03:34.265225272Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-13T20:28:01.678915105Z","closed_at":"2026-02-13T20:28:01.678893926Z","close_reason":"Implemented SSI decision evidence recording end-to-end: decision_id-enabled SsiDecisionCardDraft/Card, evidence_record span (decision_id/outcome/evidence_size_bytes), INFO+DEBUG decision logs, global queryable ledger hooks (snapshot/query), and outcome counters via ssi_evidence_metrics_snapshot. Wired ssi_validate_and_publish to record commit/abort decisions (read-only, marked-for-abort, pivot, committed-pivot, commit-approved) with read/write/conflict evidence payloads. Added tests for counter increments and txn-id queryability. Validation: cargo fmt --check -p fsqlite-mvcc; CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/cargo-target-quietwillow-mvcc cargo check -p fsqlite-mvcc --all-targets; CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/cargo-target-quietwillow-mvcc cargo clippy -p fsqlite-mvcc --all-targets -- -D warnings; targeted evidence+SSI tests pass.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["evidence","frankensqlite","impl","observability"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-19u.2","depends_on_id":"bd-19u","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:23:01Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-19u.2","depends_on_id":"bd-19u.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:23:01Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-19u.2","depends_on_id":"bd-688.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:23:01Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-19u.3","title":"Provenance semirings for query lineage","description":"Provenance semirings (§8.9): Track which input tuples contributed to each output row. Semiring annotations propagated through query execution. Supports lineage queries (why/why-not/how provenance). Tracing: span 'provenance_track' with fields query_id, annotations_propagated. Log level: DEBUG provenance flow, INFO lineage query results. Metric: fsqlite_provenance_annotations_total counter.

## Acceptance Criteria
Canonical pass/fail contract is tracked in the issue's structured `acceptance_criteria` field. This section is kept in sync for template conformance and planning hygiene.","acceptance_criteria":"1. Lineage queries return correct contributing tuples. 2. Semiring annotations propagate through joins. 3. Why/why-not provenance supported. 4. Overhead < 20% vs non-annotated query.  5. Comprehensive unit/property tests with deterministic seeds and invariant checks are required for this bead. 6. At least one deterministic end-to-end scenario script validates integrated behavior with replay instructions and artifact capture. 7. Structured logging/metrics must emit trace/run/scenario identifiers, timing, and actionable failure context, and CI must validate schema conformance.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:03:34.318921221Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-14T00:37:05.661368940Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["alien","alien-pass-2026-02-13","ev-gated","frankensqlite","impl","observability"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-19u.3","depends_on_id":"bd-19u","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:23:01Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-19u.3","depends_on_id":"bd-1rw.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:23:01Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
-{"id":"bd-19u.4","title":"NitroSketch probabilistic telemetry","description":"NitroSketch streaming stats (§15.5): Sub-linear memory for runtime query statistics. Count-Min Sketch for frequency estimation, HyperLogLog for cardinality. Streaming histograms for latency distributions. Tracing: span 'sketch_update' with fields sketch_type, items_processed. Log level: TRACE sketch updates, DEBUG periodic stats export. Metric: fsqlite_sketch_memory_bytes gauge, fsqlite_sketch_estimates counter.

## Acceptance Criteria
Canonical pass/fail contract is tracked in the issue's structured `acceptance_criteria` field. This section is kept in sync for template conformance and planning hygiene.","acceptance_criteria":"1.  {"id":"bd-19u.5","title":"sqlite3_trace_v2 compatibility shim (adoption wedge)","description":"sqlite3_trace_v2 compatibility shim: Adoption wedge providing SQLite-compatible tracing API. Maps internal tracing to sqlite3_trace_v2 callbacks. Enables drop-in replacement for existing SQLite monitoring tools. Tracing: span 'compat_trace' with fields callback_type(stmt/profile/row/close). Log level: DEBUG callback invocations. Metric: fsqlite_compat_trace_callbacks_total counter.","acceptance_criteria":"1. sqlite3_trace_v2 callbacks invoked correctly. 2. Compatible with existing SQLite monitoring tools. 3. All callback types (STMT/PROFILE/ROW/CLOSE) implemented. 4. Zero overhead when no callback registered.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:03:34.427286533Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-13T19:26:42.413722296Z","closed_at":"2026-02-13T19:26:42.413677061Z","close_reason":"Completed sqlite3_trace_v2 compatibility shim with callback events, span instrumentation, callback metrics, tests, and validation evidence.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["frankensqlite","impl","observability"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-19u.5","depends_on_id":"bd-19u","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:23:01Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-19u.5","depends_on_id":"bd-19u.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:23:01Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":2969,"issue_id":"bd-19u.5","author":"IndigoSpring","text":"Implemented sqlite3_trace_v2 compatibility shim with Connection::trace_v2(mask, callback) and TraceMask/TraceEvent API. Added compat callback emission for STMT/PROFILE/ROW/CLOSE with span target compat_trace (field callback_type), DEBUG callback logs, and metric counter fsqlite_compat_trace_callbacks_total. Re-exported TraceMask/TraceEvent in public crate surface. Validation: cargo +nightly check -p fsqlite-core --all-targets; cargo +nightly test -p fsqlite-core test_trace_v2_emits_stmt_profile_row_and_close -- --nocapture; cargo +nightly test -p fsqlite-core test_trace_v2_mask_filters_callback_types -- --nocapture; cargo +nightly test -p fsqlite-core; cargo +nightly test -p fsqlite; cargo +nightly fmt -p fsqlite-observability -p fsqlite-core -p fsqlite; cargo +nightly clippy -p fsqlite-observability --all-targets -- -D warnings; cargo +nightly clippy -p fsqlite --all-targets -- -D warnings. Remaining clippy failures are pre-existing in crates/fsqlite-core/src/repair_engine.rs and unrelated to this bead.","created_at":"2026-02-13T19:26:39Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-19u.6","title":"TEST: Trace completeness, evidence sufficiency, sketch accuracy","description":"Test bead: Observability & evidence correctness. (1) Trace completeness: verify every SQL statement produces a complete span hierarchy (parse>plan>exec>storage). (2) Evidence ledger: verify every SSI abort includes conflict evidence sufficient to explain the abort. (3) Provenance: verify lineage queries return correct contributing tuples for simple joins. (4) NitroSketch accuracy: verify cardinality estimates within 5% of exact on 1M distinct values. (5) sqlite3_trace_v2: verify callback compatibility with SQLite test harness. Acceptance: 100% span coverage, evidence for every abort, sketch accuracy < 5% error.","acceptance_criteria":"1. 100% span coverage for all SQL statements. 2. Evidence for every SSI abort. 3. Provenance correct for simple joins. 4. Sketch accuracy < 5% error. 5. sqlite3_trace_v2 callback compat verified.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:03:34.482317743Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-13T19:46:31.368586711Z","closed_at":"2026-02-13T19:46:31.368569118Z","close_reason":"Completed all acceptance slices: trace lifecycle coverage, SSI evidence sufficiency assertions, lineage/provenance join query validation, NitroSketch 1M<=5% accuracy, and sqlite3_trace_v2 callback compatibility verification.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["frankensqlite","observability","test"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-19u.6","depends_on_id":"bd-19u","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:23:01Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-19u.6","depends_on_id":"bd-19u.5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:23:01Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-19u.6","depends_on_id":"bd-2aa0w","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T19:36:32.563194834Z","created_by":"IndigoSpring","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-19u.6","depends_on_id":"bd-2j365","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T19:36:32.531339508Z","created_by":"IndigoSpring","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":2973,"issue_id":"bd-19u.6","author":"IndigoSpring","text":"Progress update: completed trace/evidence/sqlite3_trace_v2 validation slice in crates/fsqlite-core/src/connection.rs. Added test  to verify multi-statement callback lifecycle coverage (stmt/profile/row), trace metric growth, and callback counter coherence. Strengthened  with evidence-sufficiency assertions (non-empty payload fields + rationale + chain hash) for ABORT_WRITE_SKEW cards. Validation: cargo +nightly test -p fsqlite-core test_trace_v2 -- --nocapture; cargo +nightly test -p fsqlite-core test_pragma_ssi_decisions_exposes_commit_and_abort_cards -- --nocapture; cargo +nightly test -p fsqlite-core test_pragma_trace_stats_exposes_trace_metrics -- --nocapture; cargo +nightly check -p fsqlite-core --all-targets; rustfmt +nightly --edition 2024 --check crates/fsqlite-core/src/connection.rs.","created_at":"2026-02-13T19:36:57Z"},{"id":2974,"issue_id":"bd-19u.6","author":"IndigoSpring","text":"Progress update (corrected): completed trace/evidence/sqlite3_trace_v2 validation slice in `crates/fsqlite-core/src/connection.rs`.

Changes:
- Added `test_trace_v2_lifecycle_and_trace_metrics_for_multi_statement_workload` to verify multi-statement callback lifecycle coverage (stmt/profile/row), trace metric growth, and callback counter coherence.
- Strengthened `test_pragma_ssi_decisions_exposes_commit_and_abort_cards` with evidence-sufficiency assertions (non-empty payload fields + rationale + chain hash) for `ABORT_WRITE_SKEW` cards.

Validation evidence:
- `cargo +nightly test -p fsqlite-core test_trace_v2 -- --nocapture`
- `cargo +nightly test -p fsqlite-core test_pragma_ssi_decisions_exposes_commit_and_abort_cards -- --nocapture`
- `cargo +nightly test -p fsqlite-core test_pragma_trace_stats_exposes_trace_metrics -- --nocapture`
- `cargo +nightly check -p fsqlite-core --all-targets`
- `rustfmt +nightly --edition 2024 --check crates/fsqlite-core/src/connection.rs`

Acceptance item split for remaining work:
- Created `bd-2j365` for lineage/provenance query validation (item 3).
- Created `bd-2aa0w` for NitroSketch 1M-distinct <=5% accuracy validation (item 4).
- Added both as blocking deps of `bd-19u.6` so remaining acceptance is explicit.
","created_at":"2026-02-13T19:37:05Z"},{"id":2979,"issue_id":"bd-19u.6","author":"IndigoSpring","text":"Final acceptance closure update:

All five acceptance items now have concrete implementation + test evidence.

1) Trace completeness / lifecycle coverage:
- Added `test_trace_v2_lifecycle_and_trace_metrics_for_multi_statement_workload` in `crates/fsqlite-core/src/connection.rs`.
- Verifies multi-statement callback lifecycle coverage (stmt/profile/row), plus trace metric growth for statement workload.

2) Evidence sufficiency for SSI aborts:
- Strengthened `test_pragma_ssi_decisions_exposes_commit_and_abort_cards` to assert non-empty evidence payload/rationale/chain-hash fields on `ABORT_WRITE_SKEW` cards.

3) Provenance / lineage for simple joins:
- Implemented `PRAGMA lineage` / `PRAGMA fsqlite.lineage` surface in `connection.rs`.
- Added `test_pragma_lineage_returns_simple_join_contributors` validating deterministic contributing tuple IDs/keys for simple joins.

4) NitroSketch cardinality accuracy:
- Implemented `NitroSketch` estimator surface in `crates/fsqlite-mvcc/src/conflict_model.rs` (+ re-exports in `crates/fsqlite-mvcc/src/lib.rs`).
- Added `test_nitro_sketch_cardinality_accuracy_one_million_distinct` asserting <=5% relative error on 1,000,000 distinct values.

5) sqlite3_trace_v2 callback compatibility:
- Existing/new tests pass: `test_trace_v2_emits_stmt_profile_row_and_close`, `test_trace_v2_mask_filters_callback_types`, and lifecycle workload test.

Validation evidence run in this slice:
- `cargo +nightly test -p fsqlite-core test_trace_v2 -- --nocapture`
- `cargo +nightly test -p fsqlite-core test_pragma_ssi_decisions_exposes_commit_and_abort_cards -- --nocapture`
- `cargo +nightly test -p fsqlite-core test_pragma_lineage_returns_simple_join_contributors -- --nocapture`
- `cargo +nightly test -p fsqlite-mvcc nitro_sketch -- --nocapture`
- `cargo +nightly check -p fsqlite-core --all-targets`
- `cargo +nightly check -p fsqlite-mvcc --all-targets`
- `cargo +nightly clippy -p fsqlite-mvcc --all-targets -- -D warnings`
- `rustfmt +nightly --edition 2024 --check crates/fsqlite-core/src/connection.rs`
- `rustfmt +nightly --edition 2024 --check --config skip_children=true crates/fsqlite-mvcc/src/conflict_model.rs crates/fsqlite-mvcc/src/lib.rs`

Known unrelated baseline remains for `cargo +nightly clippy -p fsqlite-core --all-targets -- -D warnings`: pre-existing findings in `crates/fsqlite-core/src/repair_engine.rs` (`redundant_clone`, `cast_lossless`).
","created_at":"2026-02-13T19:46:26Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-19u.7","title":"Differential privacy for aggregate queries","description":"Differential Privacy (§12.5): Privacy-preserving aggregate query results using calibrated noise addition. Epsilon-delta privacy budget tracking per query/session. Laplace/Gaussian mechanism for numeric aggregates. Privacy budget evidence in evidence ledger. Tracing: span 'dp_query' with fields epsilon_spent, mechanism, sensitivity. Log level: INFO privacy budget consumption, WARN budget exhaustion approaching. Metric: fsqlite_dp_epsilon_spent_total counter, fsqlite_dp_queries_total counter.

## Acceptance Criteria
Canonical pass/fail contract is tracked in the issue's structured `acceptance_criteria` field. This section is kept in sync for template conformance and planning hygiene.","acceptance_criteria":"1. Epsilon-delta privacy budget tracked per session. 2. Laplace mechanism for numeric aggregates. 3. Budget exhaustion prevents further queries. 4. Privacy evidence in evidence ledger.  8. Unit/property test coverage for this bead is mandatory, including deterministic seeds and explicit invariant checks. 9. At least one deterministic end-to-end scenario script must validate integrated behavior with replay instructions and archived artifacts. 10. Structured logging/metrics validation is required: trace/run/scenario IDs, timing, counters, and actionable failure context must be present and CI-verified.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:07:10.003565766Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-14T00:37:15.426491365Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["alien","alien-pass-2026-02-13","ev-gated","frankensqlite","impl","observability"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-19u.7","depends_on_id":"bd-19u","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:23:01Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-19u.7","depends_on_id":"bd-19u.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:23:01Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
